name: Schwalbchen Molkerei Jakob Berz AG
summary: Schw√É¬§lbchen Molkerei Jakob Berz AG produces and sells dairy products in Germany. It offers milk, yogurt, cream/sour cream, quark/layer cheese, and spreads and specialties, as well as latte products under the Caffreddo name. The company was founded in 1938 and is based in Bad Schwalbach, Germany.
